title: What I think about Moab Utah

transcript.text: This is what an american no wait this is what I think about moab utah I'm doing a video about
Moab utah because I was there for like a month last year and then I was there for like three
Months back in 93 summer as a river guide and uh so it's a town that I've lived in so I'm gonna
Do a video about it because I do a video about of all towns that I've lived in moab is uh really
Great for mountain biking and really great for river rafting um really big colorado river goes
Through there and the mountain biking is great um trails everywhere you could like do a new trail
Every time I'd like to go live there again and with a mountain bike like in the summertime when
It's warm and just mountain bike all the time with a nice mountain bike and explore around that'd be
Really cool one day um and good road biking too big big big uh mountains near there um and the town
Itself is small and really touristy I think the locals are kind of backwatery though I'm conservative
And but there's all kinds of people there too you know um and uh you're it's such a touristy town that
You're supposed to like pay that's a lot of camp places even if you're just sleeping in your car
But I guess if you leave early before the people come then they can't bust you but you can sleep in
Your I don't know if it's legal to sleep in your car on the side of the road but um I just drove
Outside of the city limits and parked in my car and then um we just drive in town um they have uh
There's slick rock that's just to the eastern side of the town up the hill which is like petrified um
Sand dunes that you can ride your bike over um which is beautiful and uh yeah
Lots of uh lots of bike shops there too lots of biking
One day I could go back there okay so that's what an american's or what I think about moab
One day
